Where the Journey Began

Her Story

A Journey Built on Trust

For more than two decades, Sanjita Bhakta Raj has helped families across Nepal plan for what matters most — the security of the people they love. Her career at LIC Nepal began in 2004, and has grown into thousands of trusted relationships since.

Along the way, travel to more than 30 countries has broadened her perspective on how families around the world think about protection, saving, and long-term planning — insight she brings to every conversation.

Recognition

Awards & Milestones

A selection of the honors earned along the way — years of consistent, recognized performance.

MDRT Life Member Best Performer, LIC Nepal New Baneshwor Branch · June 2024
Chairman Club, FY 2079/080 Honored among LIC Nepal Baneshwor Branch's top-performing agents
Chairman Club Award, FY 2081/082 LIC Nepal Baneshwor Branch — 23rd Anniversary
First Day, First Policy Best Performer, LIC Nepal New Baneshwor Branch · July 2024
Professional Insurance Agent Association Nepal 4th Convention, 2081 — Janakpurdham, Dhanusha
Triple Qualifier — Ayodhya Darshan Best Performer, LIC Nepal New Baneshwor Branch · May 2024
Chairman Club Membership Certificate Awarded for outstanding performance, FY 2079/080
The Journey

Two Decades, One Purpose

A career shaped by steady growth, deeper responsibility, and an unbroken thread of trust.

2004

Joined LIC Nepal

Began a career dedicated to protecting families and building lasting trust, one conversation at a time.

2010s

Growing a Practice

Took on greater responsibility and represented LIC Nepal at seminars and international conferences, mentoring clients through life's biggest financial decisions.

Today

A Trusted Name

22+ years on, still guiding families toward financial security — with the same care as the very first policy.

Recognition

Recognized for Excellence

Top Performer, LIC Nepal

Recognized repeatedly for outstanding client service and consistent results.

22 Years of Service

Honored for over two decades of unbroken commitment to the profession.

International Delegate

Represented LIC Nepal at seminars and professional gatherings abroad.

Beyond the Office

A Global Perspective

Travel to more than 30 countries has shaped the way Sanjita listens, advises, and connects with families from every walk of life.
